overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a long coat walking up a mountain trail toward a stone lookout tower. The scene features lush green grass, rocky outcrops, and overcast skies. A horse rider briefly passes by on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky outcrops and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the dirt path toward the stone tower visible on the hill ahead

entered.detail: circular stone tower with conical roof atop a rocky hill
steep gray rock face covered with patches of grass
tall evergreen tree beside the trail
narrow winding dirt path through grass and rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a mountainous landscape with overcast skies. A stone lookout tower sits atop a rocky hill ahead, while a large cliff face and pine tree flank the left side of the path.

events.description: horse rider approaches from ahead on the trail and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing up the path as a horse rider approaches and passes by

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse down the trail toward the camera, then passing on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse rider appears in the distance and approaches rapidly. The rider, wearing a hat and bandana, passes by on the right side of the trail and continues down the mountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail approaching stone tower

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady ascent up the winding trail toward the stone tower

entered.detail: cluster of evergreen trees on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: After the horse passes, the character continues up the trail as the terrain becomes more rocky. The stone tower grows larger ahead while the left-side pine tree disappears from view and new pine trees become visible on the right. The path winds steadily upward through the grassy and rocky landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that leads from a forested path toward a prominent stone lookout tower. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail under overcast skies, flanked by a large cliff face and a solitary pine tree. As the character advances, a horse rider wearing a hat and bandana appears in the distance and rapidly passes by on the right side of the path. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes increasingly rocky and the path winds steadily upward, causing the initial pine tree to disappear from view while new trees emerge on the right. Finally, the stone tower grows larger and more imposing in the frame as the character ascends through the grassy, mountainous landscape.
